trial_details.trajectory:
From the pod description, it looks like the pod is running correctly and the container image "wrong-interface-app:latest" is being used. There are no obvious issues or errors.The pod logs show that the "wrong-interface-app" application is running correctly on the pod, listening on port 8080.The event log doesn't show any errors or issues with the pod.

After reviewing the pod status, logs, and events, I don't see any obvious problems with the "wrong-interface-app" pod. It appears to be running correctly.Based on the information gathered, I don't see any issues with the "wrong-interface-app" pod. It is running correctly without any errors or problems.
